metadata.project_name: Commercial Project Figure Q2 - Supported Review Model 0.12
notes: 0.12 corrects the 0.11 structural support gap: slabs are now supported by a visible beam/column/wall grid.
Beams coincident with core wall lines are intentionally omitted because the wall is the vertical support.
Office typical floor now includes intermediate support line(s); if column-free office intent is reinstated, a formal transfer/PT/composite long-span design is required.
This remains review-grade; member sizes are seed sizes pending formal gravity/lateral analysis.

coordinate_system.grid_reference_basis: Lower-left corner of normalized podium envelope; tower footprint uses same X origin and 20m normalized depth.

value.status: review-grade support corrected; not final analysis

issues.message: 0.11 Revit import passed, but structural support did not: large slab fields lacked visible beam/column/wall support and should not have been treated as structurally passed.
0.12 adds podium support grid with typical x bay <= 8m and y bay <= 10m; office/refuge y bays are 5m, 7m, and 8m.
Beams coincident with core wall lines are omitted because the wall directly supports the slab/collector line.
Atrium and skylight openings have explicit perimeter beams and support columns at perimeter/corner conditions.

Office typical now includes intermediate structural support. If the architectural intent requires column-free offices, this review model must be replaced by a formally designed transfer/PT/composite long-span option.
Seed member sizes are not final design. Formal gravity, lateral, deflection, vibration, and foundation checks remain required.
